safety_rail_catch: GIPR (contested control) was CONFLICTED on T2D-direct but the glycemic bridge tried to rescue it to 'inhibitor' (9 loci). Fix: fallback fires ONLY on INSUFFICIENT_DIRECTION, never on RECOVERY_CONFLICTED. GIPR now stays refused.
biology_note: GIPR conflicted-on-disease but clean-on-glycemic reflects the GIP agonist/antagonist paradox; the divergence is preserved, not resolved.
